charter: Ship testing scaffold (vitest + E2E) in all framework templates — every agentxchain init project gets a working test harness
acceptance_contract: All templates in cli/src/templates/ include vitest.config.js boilerplate and sample test files
Package.json templates include test/test:unit/test:e2e npm scripts with vitest devDependency
Dev role prompts in templates reference vitest patterns and testing standards
Verification gates validate test evidence from vitest runs
New project from agentxchain init can run npm test successfully out of the box
